results.evidence: Preview toggle renders body as HTML via renderMarkdown() in separate div with dangerouslySetInnerHTML only (no children conflict). Verified in CreateSkillInline.tsx:636-648 and CreateSkillPage.tsx:806-818.
Empty body branch renders placeholder span 'Start writing to see preview' in a separate div without dangerouslySetInnerHTML. CreateSkillInline.tsx:649-663 and CreateSkillPage.tsx:819-833.
AI reasoning rendered via dangerouslySetInnerHTML={{ __html: renderMarkdown(aiReasoning) }} in expanded section. CreateSkillInline.tsx:494-499 and CreateSkillPage.tsx:586-591.
Banner collapsed by default (reasoningExpanded=false), chevron rotates on click, 'click to expand reasoning' hint shown when collapsed. CreateSkillInline.tsx:453-501 and CreateSkillPage.tsx:545-593.
